series_metadata.series_description: The Incomplete Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) files are medical treatment dispute packets received from Managed Care Organizations (MCO) that cannot be processed for some reason (e.g. missing ADR Information Guide, missing a peer to peer file review or independent medical examination report, missing an MCO or BWC appeal, not an appropriate peer to peer review conducted, appropriate C-9 or treatment request, initial C-9 review, initial MCO Decision, MCO ADR Summary Report).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: machine readable information will be reviewed every ensure that files can still be accessed. original Portable Document Format (PDF) of Incomplete ADR Files on J drive 17 years (Incomplete ADR Files are part of a 2 year contract that can be litigated up 15 years contract expires), and ; Paper: Records of Incomplete ADR Files were received prior MCO’s sending in ADR Files electronically are maintained at a record storage facility. Incomplete ADR Files 17 years (Incomplete ADR Files are part of a 2 year contract that can be litigated up 15 years contract expires), and
